specific_question: In Q3 2024, what percentage of customer service contacts experienced technical issues with the MediConn platform?
answer: In Q3 2024, according to MediConn's IT department reports, 8% of customer service inquiries experienced technical issues like login problems, video connection failures, or app crashes.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
